description_long: This handgun features a compact, utilitarian design with a predominantly black metal body and a distinctive blue component at the rear, likely the grip or a custom backstrap. The frame is robust and angular, with a thick, squared-off trigger guard and a pronounced, flat-sided magazine well. The barrel is short and cylindrical, extending slightly beyond the frame, and the overall finish is matte with some visible wear and metallic highlights. The blue rear section appears to be made of a different material, possibly polymer or painted metal, and adds a unique visual contrast. There are no visible manufacturer markings or decorative engravings, giving the weapon a functional, almost improvised appearance. The grip is wide and flat, suggesting a focus on stability and ease of handling rather than ergonomic contouring.
description: A compact black handgun with a blue rear grip, featuring a robust, angular frame and a short cylindrical barrel. The design is utilitarian with minimal markings and a striking color contrast.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the front, showing the barrel opening and the symmetrical, squared-off frame.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the blue rear grip, the thick trigger guard, and the overall angular construction of the frame.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the blue grip section and the back of the slide, with the magazine well visible below.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the blue grip, the robust frame, and the short barrel extension.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is wide, flat, and angular, constructed from a blue material that contrasts with the rest of the handgun. Its surface appears smooth with minimal texturing, lacking finger grooves or checkering, and is likely designed for basic stability rather than advanced ergonomics. There are no visible logos, embellishments, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick, rounded, and robust, forming a pronounced curve beneath the trigger area. It is solid with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and there are no visible reinforcements or accessory rails. The design is simple and functional, prioritizing protection and durability.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short, cylindrical, and unadorned, extending slightly from the front of the frame. It has a plain, matte finish with no visible threading, porting, or compensator attachments. There are no external markings or fluting on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unembellished, with a matte black finish and some minor wear.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and wide, matching the angular design of the grip. It lacks any flaring, finger rests, or texturing, and there are no visible logos or embellishments. The design is straightforward and functional.
